title: Opinion: Opinion | Mines, Submarines, Drones: Why World's Mightiest Navy Won't Get Too Close To Hormuz
summary_full: Iran is relying on the symmetric advantage of geography to fight against the brute power of the world's largest and most powerful navy, the US.
